# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"

plugins:
  - name: cors
    global: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app1.mycompany.com"
        - "https://app2.mycompany.com"
      methods:
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
      headers:
        - "Content-Type"
        - "Accept"
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
  - name: jwt
    global: true
    # Global JWT plugin enabled. Specific realm/settings are often defined per service or route,
    # or rely on global consumers/secrets configured elsewhere.
    config: {}
  - name: rate-limiting
    global: true
    config:
      minute: 100
      policy: "local"
      limit_by: "ip"
      # Global default: 100 requests per minute per IP

services:
  - name: internal-api-service
    host: internal-api.example.com
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        # Service-level CORS overrides global settings
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://admin.mycompany.com"
            - "https://api-dashboard.mycompany.com"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
            - "PUT"
            - "DELETE"
          headers:
            - "Content-Type"
            - "Authorization"
            - "X-Custom-Header"
          exposed_headers:
            - "X-Pagination-Total"
          credentials: true
          max_age: 172800 # 2 days
      - name: jwt
        # Service-level JWT configuration
        config:
          realm: "Internal API"
          uri_param_names:
            - "jwt"
          cookie_names:
            - "token"
          anonymous: "anonymous_consumer_id" # Optional: Consumer ID for unauthenticated requests
      - name: rate-limiting
        # Service-level Rate Limiting overrides global settings
        config:
          minute: 60
          policy: "local"
          limit_by: "consumer" # Limit by consumer for this service
          # 60 requests per minute per consumer

    routes:
      - name: admin-panel-route
        paths:
          - /admin
        strip_path: true
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            # Route-level CORS overrides service and global settings
            config:
              origins:
                - "https://admin.mycompany.com"
              methods:
                - "GET"
                - "POST"
              headers:
                - "Content-Type"
                - "Authorization"
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
          - name: jwt
            # Route-level JWT configuration (can further refine/override service settings)
            config:
              realm: "Admin Panel"
              # This route requires JWT authentication, no anonymous access
              anonymous: "" # Explicitly remove anonymous for this route if set on service
          - name: rate-limiting
            # Route-level Rate Limiting overrides service and global settings
            config:
              minute: 10
              policy: "local"
              limit_by: "consumer" # Strict limit per consumer for this specific route
              # 10 requests per minute per consumer for the /admin path
